# Renewal Management (Renewly) — Reproduction Report

Built end-to-end on env `appslib` (NocoBase 2.1.0-alpha.45), dark theme, all-English seed. Reproduced strictly from the prototype's embedded `nb-spec` (the authoritative source).

## 1. Collections (prefix `rnw_`)

| Collection | Rows | Key fields | Enum coverage (all ≥1 ✓) |
|---|---|---|---|
| `rnw_users` | 4 | name, role, initials | role: csm·2, am·1, manager·1 |
| `rnw_products` | 7 | name, plan_tier, term | plan_tier: starter·2/growth·2/business·1/enterprise·2 · term: monthly·2/annual·4/multi_year·1 |
| `rnw_customers` | 15 | name, segment, industry, owner_name, health_score, mrr, logo_seed | segment: enterprise·6/mid_market·5/smb·3/startup·1 |
| `rnw_renewals` | 15 | title, stage, arr, uplift_pct, probability, auto_renew, expiry_date, last_touch, note + **m2o** customer/product/owner | stage: upcoming·3/outreach·3/negotiation·3/at_risk·3/won·2/lost·1 |

Dates anchored to **real today (2026-06-10)** so the default-month calendar is dense and kanban countdown chips vary (soon/near/ok) instead of all reading "30d+".

## 2. Pages

**Signature page — Renewal Cockpit**
- **pageUid: `6m7hedjkw5e`**  ·  pageSchemaUid (URL): **`/admin/li7itwkackw`**
- Layout matches the prototype: **KPI strip** (top, full width) · **pipeline Kanban** (left) · **right rail = expiry Calendar over health-score List**.
- 4 regions, container-native + content-JS per the hard rule:
  - **KPI strip** — freestanding `JSBlockModel` (the only data-less block), 5 live-computed tiles via `ctx.initResource`.
  - **Pipeline** — native `Kanban` grouped by `stage` + **one JS card field** (logo, segment, plan pill, ARR+uplift chip, win-probability bar, countdown/Renewed/Churned chip, owner avatar + health dot, at-risk red border, AUTO badge). Native drag + card-click→drawer preserved.
  - **Expiry calendar** — native `Calendar`, start/end=`expiry_date`, `colorField=stage` (events color-coded by stage).
  - **Health leaderboard** — native `List` (rnw_customers) + **JS card field** with SVG gauge ring (green/amber/red), MRR + live open-ARR, trend chip + CSM avatar; sorted `health_score asc` (worst-first).

**4 master CRUD pages** under menu group "Renewly Data" (Table + Filter + Add new + View/Edit drawers): Renewals `yc4z9hsd1j3` · Customers `u6mnk2bgm2u` · Products `f1iozuw4vno` · Users `ywoeuoie51z`.

## 3. Self-Score: **8.5/10**

Verified: every block renders, **zero console/page errors**, dark theme native (bg `rgb(20,20,20)`, no white patches), card-click opens the native drawer, all enum branches seeded, relations populated.

## 4. Comparison vs prototype

- **Matches:** region layout & positions; card anatomy (logo/title/segment/plan/ARR/uplift/prob-bar/due-chip/owner/health-dot); stage color language (blue/purple/gold/red/green/gray); health color thresholds; worst-first health sort; Won→"Renewed", Lost→"Churned", at-risk red border.
- **Native-vs-custom tradeoffs (intentional):** KPI tiles use accent bars + honest sub-labels instead of the prototype's decorative sparklines/▲▼ trend pills; kanban has no per-column "total ARR" footer (native limit); calendar is NocoBase's native month grid rather than the prototype's compact dot-calendar — functionally equivalent, stylistically different.
- **Numbers differ by design:** KPIs/open-ARR are computed live from seed (e.g. $2.33M open ARR, 96.4% gross rate) vs the prototype's hardcoded mock ($2.84M, 91.4%) — correct behavior, not fudged.
- **Minor gap:** the kanban detail drawer shows raw FK ids (customerId/…) instead of relation titles, because the auto-generated popup `fieldGroups` lists the FK columns; the cards themselves resolve names correctly.

## 5. Pitfalls hit (坑)

1. **Kanban height silently breaks grouping** — the biggest trap. Running `configure {heightMode,height}` on the kanban dropped its columns at runtime (only `filter={stage:null}` fired) even though groupField/o
